messages.content: me and jordan broke up last weekend and i'm just kinda sad about it

That kind of sadness makes sense — something real ended, and it takes time to settle.

What's sitting heaviest for you right now?
it was pretty mutual, nobody did anything terrible, we just wanted different things

That can actually make it harder in some ways — no clear villain, no clean story to tell yourself, just a quiet loss.

What did you two want that was so different?
still though, three years. i keep reaching for my phone to text them stuff and then remembering

That reflex is one of the harder parts — your habits haven't caught up to the new reality yet.

What kinds of things do you find yourself wanting to tell them?
i had a little cry tonight watching one of our old shows. felt good actually, like letting it out

That sounds like exactly the right thing for tonight — letting yourself feel it rather than pushing it away.

Is there someone around you who knows what you're going through?
i'll be ok, i know i will. just gonna be a sad few weeks and that's normal i think
You're reading it clearly — grief with a floor under it is still grief, and it deserves the time it takes.
